testcase.name: test_order_pickup_1_self_pickup_registered

failure.message:
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (353, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome-headless-shell=125.0.6422.141); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: #0 0x55fef6e8de3a #1 0x55fef6b7745c #2 0x55fef6bca336 #3 0x55fef6bc8176 #4 0x55fef6bc5b57 #5 0x55fef6bc497c #6 0x55fef6bb80ff #7 0x55fef6be64b2 #8 0x55fef6bb7a79 #9 0x55fef6be667e #10 0x55fef6c052cc #11 0x55fef6be6253 #12 0x55fef6bb61c7 #13 0x55fef6bb6b3e #14 0x55fef6e5427b #15 0x55fef6e58327 #16 0x55fef6e40dae #17 0x55fef6e58df2 #18 0x55fef6e2574f #19 0x55fef6e7d128 #20 0x55fef6e7d2fb #21 0x55fef6e8cf6c #22 0x7f7879f34609 start_thread

testcase.failure:
E selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element

is not clickable at point (353, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
